title: [Control systems] Siemens security advisory (AV26-212)
description: On March 10, 2026, Siemens published advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products. Included were updates for the following:
products: Heliox Flex 180 kW EV Charging Station  versions prior to F4.11.1
Heliox Mobile DC 40 kW EV Charging Station  versions prior to L4.10.1
RUGGEDCOM APE1808  all versions with Fortigate NGFW prior to V7.4.11
RUGGEDCOM APE1808  all versions with Fortigate NGFW prior to V7.4.10
SIDIS Prime  versions prior to V4.0.800
SICAM SIAPP SDK  versions prior to V2.1.7
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
